notes: Zapier polls SOQL for most of these (SystemModstamp/LastModifiedDate cursor). 'New Outbound Message' uses Salesforce Outbound Messaging — a vendor webhook configured in Workflow Rules — which maps to OpenFn's webhook pattern. Salesforce also exposes Platform Events / CDC / Streaming API for push, but Zapier does not use them.

triggers.name: New Attachment on Record
triggers.description: Fires when an attachment, note, or content document is added or updated on any record of the specified object.

triggers.name: New Case Attachment
triggers.description: Fires when a new attachment is added to a Case.

triggers.name: New Contact
triggers.description: Fires when a new Contact is created.

triggers.name: New Field Update
triggers.description: Fires when a chosen field is updated on any record of a specified object.

triggers.name: New Field Values Changed
triggers.description: Fires when a field is updated on the object specified. Outputs old and new field values.

triggers.name: New Lead
triggers.description: Fires when a new Lead is created.

triggers.name: New Outbound Message
triggers.description: Fires when a new outbound message is received from Salesforce (Workflow Rule → Outbound Messaging).

output.summary: SOAP notification envelope with the record snapshot

triggers.name: New Record
triggers.description: Fires when a record of the specified object is created.

triggers.name: Updated Record
triggers.description: Fires when any record of the specified object is updated.
